name: Accordions
description: Collapsible boxes to hide and show details smoothly.

name: Alerts
description: Banners for quick notices, warnings, and messages.

description: User profile pictures with online/offline status indicators.

name: Badges
description: Small status labels to highlight information with icons.

name: Buttons
description: Buttons for actions, with loading spinners and icons.

name: Code Block
description: Code syntax highlighting blocks with built-in copy buttons.

name: Dock
description: Floating menu bar with smooth pop-out animations.

name: Dropzone
description: Drag and drop file uploaders with file lists.

name: Inputs
description: Text input fields with icons, labels, and error states.

name: Switch
description: Smooth toggle switches with beautiful animations.

name: Textarea
description: Multi-line text areas with support for text limits.

name: Video Embed
description: Premium HTML5 custom video player with glassmorphic controls.

name: Slider
description: Premium range sliders with touch support and live value bubbles.

name: Tooltip
description: Elegant floating info bubbles with glassmorphic depth overrides.
